transcript.clean_text: days to win at the tour to France are running out you can watch them all live and On Demand on gcn plus the Breakaway gotten away from the sprinters of Alinda KCK but on stage 19 they perhaps were trying to join in EF education easy post as well so our quick steper finally got first win through kesper aren and they'd be looking for more day running out the stage win train making its last stop for most of the bunch with Paris out the question unless you're a sprinter and Saturday stage 20 to l marstein a difficult one for the GC Riders and climbers so everything was on the 19th stage to PO in Thea in eastern France Scenic beautiful but tough 172.2 km with two classified climbs but 2,100 M of unclassified climbing too and what a fight we had from the start to the end a breaka away just would not go 40 km in here and still groups going being brought back all the time Adam Yates had been C out in an early GC split but he'd been towed back without that problem groups formed groups continue to be brought back the green jersey involved at points and 117 km remained when nine Riders managed to break three a nine top quality Riders again Victor capat there for a second day running and they get around a minute and a half as a maximum Gap but three teams de Ed that they'd Chase on one of those strong nine Riders though was Neils pollet he snapped his chain and couldn't get the bike he needed to continue he'd even have to work to get back into the main pelan and with 75 K to go the Gap coming down to 32 seconds an intermediate Sprint and a group carrying on through it it was all change again one of the fastest races of the year one of the fastest races in the history of the tour to France and it will get even faster Victor karat attacking Simon Clark going with him and 36 other Riders this time who formed the new break try to chase them Clark though would suffer with cramp with 32 and a half case to go behind there were too many to get agreement about how they work so it was down to attacks ascar again going on it finding him himself at the front card is not able to continue and for passengers for the moment mic and O Conor mes would lose contact of a group that included the likes of Huna fander paol and Phillipson but the right ingredients in the chase were struggling to be found three previous stage winners of the Tour of France at the front and someone on debut crashing out the back Israel PR Tech had had four riders in the group Corbin strong crashing a mechanical put out Warren Bill another one of the big name of the almost 40 Riders who'd broken clear but half a minute with sixks to go and it was going to be a big ass for the next chasing group this time around 10 Riders including Laport pson trentin ferol a deluxe group but up against moic o' Conor at a again nen they took it to the final kilometer they took it to the final 400 m that's when Ben o Conor made his move not seen as quick as either Asin or maharic in a Sprint he'd be taken about 150 m to the line and then it was down to ascin and maharic arren again leing out from the front maharic trying to get on level terms both throwing to the line none of them knew who'd won 49.1 km per hour the fifth fastest stage in history and the photo finish showed that it would be a third stage win at this particular tour to France for bahin victorious emotions running high for mate mic and everybody who was riding for the late ginoa maharic asaran okona a fantastic race and look at all the names in the top 10 more entertainment cycling fans could not ask for the yellow Jersey coming across at almost 14 minutes but nobody had been dangerous in that front group of almost 40 Riders as Jonas V signed out on another job well done the general classification unchanged going into the final medium Mountain Stage of this toour of France and that stage takes the male Riders to where the female Riders were a year previous on the first to of FR fam a ex Rift a finish at lumain up and down all day the famous Balon delas to start the party a sage in the vge to finish the GC should be finished already but you just never know it this tour Breakaway stage went up for grabs as well I'm sure they'll be thinking so anyway or will it be the GC guys you'll have to tune in GCM plus live or on demand to find out
